message:
🐛 fix: use heredocs in docs-link-checker workflow (#84)

Fix YAML syntax error on line 121 caused by embedded newlines
in bash multi-line strings. Using heredocs avoids YAML parsing
issues with the multi-line comment and body arguments.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -116,9 +116,12 @@ jobs:
             else
               echo "Issue #$number: Link appears to be fixed, closing..."
               gh issue close "$number" --repo kubestellar/docs \
-                --comment "✅ This link appears to be fixed! Verified by the automated link checker.
+                --comment "$(cat <<'EOF'
+✅ This link appears to be fixed! Verified by the automated link checker.
 
-If this was closed in error, please reopen the issue." || echo "Failed to close issue #$number"
+If this was closed in error, please reopen the issue.
+EOF
+)" || echo "Failed to close issue #$number"
               sleep 1
             fi
           done
@@ -157,7 +160,8 @@ If this was closed in error, please reopen the issue." || echo "Failed to close
             gh issue create --repo kubestellar/docs \
               --title "$issue_title" \
               --label "help wanted,bug,documentation" \
-              --body "## Broken Link Detected
+              --body "$(cat <<EOF
+## Broken Link Detected
 
 **URL:** \`$url\`
 **Status:** $status
@@ -171,7 +175,9 @@ This broken link was automatically detected by the link checker workflow.
 3. Submit a PR with the fix
 
 ---
-🤖 Auto-generated by [docs-link-checker](https://github.com/kubestellar/infra/actions/workflows/docs-link-checker.yml)" || echo "Failed to create issue for $url"
+🤖 Auto-generated by [docs-link-checker](https://github.com/kubestellar/infra/actions/workflows/docs-link-checker.yml)
+EOF
+)" || echo "Failed to create issue for $url"
 
             # Rate limit to avoid API issues
             sleep 2
